environment_variable_path_augmentations.win32: D:\Program Files\Nvidia\CUDA\v12.8\bin;D:\Program Files\Nvidia\CUDA\v12.8\libnvvp;;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;D:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Pandoc\;D:\Program Files\ffmpeg-8.0-essentials_build\ffmpeg-8.0-essentials_build\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Compute 2025.1.0\;F:\texlive\2025\bin\windows;C:\Program Files (x86)\EasyShare\x86\;C:\Program Files (x86)\EasyShare\x64\;C:\Users\31437\.local\bin;C:\Users\31437\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\31437\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\31437\AppData\Roaming\npm;D:\Program Files\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin

platform_specific_commands.default:
#!/bin/bash

# 请自行修改Hexo项目目录
PROJECT_DIR="F:\weblog"
PORT=4000

# 切换到项目目录
chcp 65001 >nul &&f: &&cd "$PROJECT_DIR" || { echo "Failed to navigate to $PROJECT_DIR"; exit 1; }

# 清理生成的文件并启动Hexo服务器
hexo clean
kill -9 $(lsof -t -i:$PORT) 2>/dev/null
hexo server &

# 等待服务器启动
while ! curl -s http://localhost:4000 > /dev/null; do
  sleep 1
done

# 打开浏览器
open "http://localhost:$PORT"
